ISessionAuthSecondary Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The ISessionAuthSecondary type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
ErrorMessage
If any errors occurred during second-factor authentication, this property returns the error message.
IsAuthenticated
IsEnabled
Returns a flag indicating if this second-factor authentication is enabled.
Name
Identifies this type of second-factor authentication to the client.
